trend.name: Plague Scare
trend.blurb: Illness spreads through the lower districts. Healing supplies are flying off shelves.

trend.name: Mage Convention
trend.blurb: Scholars from the Academy have arrived in town. Magical goods are in high demand.

trend.name: Tavern Special
trend.blurb: The local tavern is running a "Brave Hero" promotion. Potions selling fast tonight.

trend.name: Alchemist Shortage
trend.blurb: The town alchemist has closed his doors. Consumables are scarce and buyers will pay more.

trend.name: Bandit Trouble
trend.blurb: Bandits on the eastern road have travelers spooked. Weapons and armor moving quickly.

trend.name: Hunting Season
trend.blurb: The annual hunt has begun. Bows and light weapons are popular with the rangers.

trend.name: Iron Surplus
trend.blurb: A merchant caravan flooded the market with cheap iron. Metal goods fetch less today.

trend.name: Tournament Week
trend.blurb: Knights have gathered for the regional tournament. Fine weapons are highly sought after.

trend.name: Collector's Fair
trend.blurb: A traveling collector is paying handsomely for rare curiosities and exotic materials.

trend.name: Monster Sighting
trend.blurb: Something large was spotted near the forest. Monster materials are fetching high prices.

trend.name: Quiet Day
trend.blurb: Nothing unusual in the markets today. A steady day of trade.

trend.name: Festival Preparations
trend.blurb: Townsfolk are preparing for the harvest festival. Luxury goods are popular gifts.

trend.name: Trade Embargo
trend.blurb: The eastern trade routes are blocked. Imported goods are worth more than usual.

trend.name: Economic Slump
trend.blurb: Coin is tight across the district. Buyers are reluctant and budgets are thin.

trend.name: Adventurers' Guild Contract
trend.blurb: The guild posted a high-value contract. Adventurers are gearing up and spending freely.
